data.title: Nasdaq ISE Files to Lift BlackRock IBIT Option Limits Into Top Tier Status
data.description:
The Nasdaq International Securities Exchange (ISE) has officially submitted a request to raise the option limits for BlackRock's Investment Grade Bond and Income Trust (IBIT) products, aiming to elevate them into a higher tier status. This move is part of a broader strategy to enhance trading opportunities and liquidity for investors in these financial instruments, reflecting a commitment to promoting robust market activity and supporting the investment goals of their clients. By achieving this top-tier status, BlackRock's IBIT options will likely offer greater flexibility and appeal to traders and investors seeking to navigate the complexities of the current financial landscape.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/11/26/nasdaq-ise-files-to-lift-blackrock-ibit-option-limits-into-top-tier-status

data.title: FSB joins Russia’s mining crackdown busting the crypto farm of a politician’s son
data.description:
Russia’s powerful Federal Security Service (FSB) is now taking part in efforts to curb illegal cryptocurrency mining across the vast country. Russian law enforcement’s latest hit is the Bitcoin farm of a businessman with political connections, arrested for the theft of electricity worth millions of rubles. FSB disrupts major illegal mining operation in Chelyabinsk Officers […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/fsb-joins-russias-mining-crackdown/

data.title: Dogecoin ETF Logs $1.4 Million in Debut Volume, Nearly 10 Times Below Initial Forecast
data.description:
Key Insights: The first spot Dogecoin ETF launched on November 24, with $1. 4 million in trading volume, significantly below Bloomberg senior ETF analyst Eric Balchunas’s $12 million day-one forecast. Grayscale’s GDOG became the first memecoin-related ETF in the US, but attracted roughly 10 times less volume than initially projected. Balchunas called the performance “solid for […] The post Dogecoin ETF Logs $1
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/11/26/dogecoin-etf-logs-1-4-million-in-debut-volume-nearly-10-times-below-initial-forecast/

data.title: South Korea's Stablecoin War Heats Up As Tech Giants Race To Challenge Dollar Dominance
data.description:
South Korea’s race to build a Korean won-pegged stablecoin escalated today as KakaoBank signaled a move from planning to active development, while rival tech giant Naver officially confirmed a $10. 3 billion merger with the nation’s largest crypto exchange. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/Opinion/25/11/49091933/south-koreas-stablecoin-war-heats-up-as-tech-giants-race-to-challenge-dollar-dominance?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: House Democrats Issue Report Detailing Trump Crypto Ties as 'New Age of Corruption'
data.description:
House Democrats have released a comprehensive report that outlines the connections between former President Donald Trump and the cryptocurrency sector, characterizing these relationships as indicative of a troubling 'new age of corruption' in American politics. The report delves into various aspects of Trump's involvement with cryptocurrency ventures and highlights the potential implications for ethics and transparency in government.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2025/11/26/house-democrats-issue-report-detailing-trump-s-crypto-ties-as-new-age-of-corruption

data.title: UK Regulator Tests Industry-Led Solution to Protect Crypto Investors
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/uk-regulator-tests-industry-led-solution-to-protect-crypto-investors/

data.title: Binance launches ‘Binance Prestige’ Bespoke service for private wealth and asset allocators
data.description:

Binance Prestige has been designed to meet the needs of family offices, private funds, and other asset allocators who want a high-touch, professional approach to managing crypto […]

data.title: Warning: XRP Price Is Forming A Death Cross That Previously Led To A 15% Crash
data.description:
The XRP price is currently at risk of a crash as crypto analyst Umair has revealed that the altcoin has formed a death cross. Notably, this same pattern formed the last time that XRP suffered a 15% crash. XRP Price At Risk With Death Cross Forming In an X post, Umair stated that a death cross was forming on the daily chart for the XRP price. He further noted that the last time the altcoin printed this setup, it crashed by 15%, which, the analyst said, lines up perfectly with a potential decline to the $1
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-is-forming-a-death-cross/

data.title: UK to expand bill issuance to appeal to stablecoin issuers, diversify investor base
data.description:
The UK government is reportedly considering expanding the Treasury bill issuance as a way to broaden the investor base for its short-term debt while bolstering the sterling currency markets. The plan is to go through its Debt Management Office (DMO) and is taking the steps amid escalating demand from new buyers like stablecoin issuers, who […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/uk-bill-issuance-appeal-stablecoin-issuers/
